title: Why colour changes are so limited?
excerpt: Why can we not change the colour of the boards or change the colour of a specific status equal to other status.

posts.author: IvanGentil (Ivan Gentil de Rosa Oliveira)
posts.cookedHtml: Why can we not change the colour of the boards or change the colour of a specific status equal to other status.

posts.author: CharlotteK (Charlotte Kirkham)
posts.cookedHtml: Hey Ivan! You should be able to change the colors of your groups and status labels! Can you attach a picture in a reply to this thread of what you’re referring to? I’d love to take a look so we can make your board as colorful as possible!
